archived_repo.name: heliosBench
archived_repo.description: An internal tool or component for the Phenotype ecosystem.

search_methods: gh search repos 'helios-bench OR heliosbench user:KooshaPari'
gh search repos 'helios in:name user:KooshaPari' (scoped broader)

candidates.name: Benchora
candidates.description: Rust benchmarking and performance-testing framework for the Phenotype ecosystem — criterion-based load testing, regression tracking, and metrics

recommendation_rationale: Only candidate surfaced under KooshaPari with matching lineage (benchmarks/Phenotype-ecosystem focus).
Functionally supersedes heliosBench: same niche (Phenotype benchmarking) but rewritten in Rust with criterion, load testing, regression tracking.
heliosBench has zero forks, so no fork-network successor exists.
notable_negatives: Zero forks of heliosBench (no fork-network successor).
No parent/source (heliosBench is not itself a fork).
No `Phenotype/helios*` successor in GitHub search (org-scoped queries returned no permission/result).
Third-party helios* repos in search are unrelated (oxidecomputer, a16z, etc.).
